deliberate_omissions: No explicit business outcome beyond 'better reports'
No data source, UI surface, quality, delivery, rollout, or governance detail

brief.rationale: A thin intake may render superficial actor/process narrative from the raw text, but business value, design, technology, and governance must stay pending and downstream must remain blocked.

blocked_commands.name: specs blocked while blocking discovery gaps remain
backlog blocked while blocking discovery gaps remain

golden_queries.query: what acceptance signal confirms the reports are done
what is the scope and boundary of the reporting
what is the success metric and target users for the reports
golden_queries.rationale: Distractor-competitive query (echoes success/metric/users/scope vocabulary shared with the multi-domain distractor corpus): hash retrieval misses the correct section AND surfaces a wrong-domain distractor. Falsifiable target IMP-121+ must lift while keeping distractors out.

golden_queries.query: fuente de la metrica linea base y metodo de medicion de los reportes
golden_queries.rationale: Cross-lingual section query; expected to FAIL with hash embeddings (no semantics) and become a hard gate once a semantic local embedder is active (IMP-029/121).
